creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Update from 3.0.3 to 3.1.0.

	Watches and warnings are now "plotted" as text written into a text window. The previous releases should have been 3.1.x, but were not, so this one makes that step up.

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--BKwiEaS30NK1VfB8qxaXNxxH7d5Y1cOvZwvgLRO0eH4YZatp
Content-Type: text/plain; name="jstrack.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="jstrack.patch"

diff -ruN science/jstrack.orig/Makefile science/jstrack/Makefile
--- science/jstrack.orig/Makefile	2010-07-16 13:11:55.000000000 +0100
+++ science/jstrack/Makefile	2010-07-26 22:36:38.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	jstrack
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	science
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.jstrack.org/${PORTNAME}/downloads/ \
 		http://www.bayofrum.net/dist/${PORTNAME}/
